posts.author: BennyO (BennyO)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

hihi!

I really appreciate the email sequences in the Sales CRM — they’ve been effective. At the same time, I’ve noticed that LinkedIn messages tend to work better for certain groups of audiences.

What are you trying to achieve

I’d like to suggest a LinkedIn integration feature, so I could trigger/track/automate my conversations directly within one platform. This would provide a more seamless workflow and help ensure better engagement across both email and LinkedIn.

Thanks for considering this!
